terracotta.title: Terracotta Multiplayer
terracotta.subtitle: Secure, cross-platform Minecraft P2P multiplayer
terracotta.quick.description: Create or join a Terracotta room to play Minecraft with friends.
terracotta.lanHint: Start Minecraft and open your single-player world to LAN before creating a room.
terracotta.description.idle: Create a room or enter a 12-character room code to join.
terracotta.description.waitingGame: Terracotta will continue after Minecraft starts.
terracotta.description.waitingLan: Choose Open to LAN from the pause menu.
terracotta.description.connected: The Terracotta network is ready. Invite your friends to join.
terracotta.description.reconnecting: The network was interrupted and is being restored.
terracotta.diagnostics.title: Terracotta Diagnostics
terracotta.diagnostics.notice: Diagnostic reports are never uploaded automatically. Tokens, keys, and credentials are redacted before generation.
terracotta.identity.temporary: Secure storage is unavailable. A temporary identity will be used for this session and will change after restarting the launcher.
